headline: ₹100-300 Cr at risk (routine capex deployment, not revenue at risk) — Adani Power wins 2,500 MW RTC renewable contract, strengthening its clean energy portfolio
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD, EU Taxonomy frameworks; no immediate penalty or deadline risk.
No immediate P/E change; long-term margin impact depends on execution and power purchase agreement terms.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital if green financing is accessed; no immediate bond spread impact.
